raw_consumer_statement:
I was swindled by XXXX XXXX. I paid for what was supposed to be a lavish vacation for four people and did not at all get what I paid for. 

I have submitted an excessive amount of documentation to American Express and and they are saying the company offered XX/XX/year> of the total cost in rewards points so Im out of luck. 

Credit card companies are supposed to protect their customers and Ive been an impeccable customer for XXXX years. 

Most recently, sandals provided a falsified statement to American Express after American Express said they resolved my CFPB complaint and credited my account. So like a bait and switch, once the CFPB issue was resolved, they retracted and refilled my account when I never received what I paid for. 

I know factually that they falsified the document because they states they did a fall review and did not provide a recording of the call. However, it states he/him in the details though I am a woman and the only one who has ever spoken to them and certainly mentioned XXXX as its unfortunately a part of my everyday life and extremely important for traveling. I even have wheelchair assistance on all my flights. 

The booking clearly shows XXXXXXXX XXXX as part of the package which they say XXXX  will go above and beyond for you get you what you need. Then ask you to fill out butler preferences for when you arrive such as foods/drinks in the room, etc. None of it was met including shower chairs for my and my XXXX mother. Bizarre how I never mentioned XXXX except very clearly asked for shower chairs for both rooms. 

Then I was told by staff that I can get things in the gift shop if I want, but they cant accommodate my butler preferences. 

These peach of a by both XXXX and American Express are deeply deceptive and a failure on both parties.
